the most annoying app ever. utterly disgusting. despite having premium subscription, this app does not work properly at all. so much lagging and a disgusting amount of bugs. it takes forever to load even when the songs are already downloaded and sometimes takes a minute or two to play the song you click on. not to mention how the songs don't even get saved to your playlist properly. some get saved, but some require you to add it multiple times. this app is ridiculously disappointing.

Earlier, Spotify used to be a really good app. We had the option to either play songs normally or choose shuffle according to our preference. But now, users are just forced to listen to whatever was played earlier, with barely any control left. And the ads? Earlier they were still bearable, but now it feels more like a full-time advertisement app where, out of nowhere, you occasionally get to listen to some music in between. I've enjoyed using Spotify, but the free version has some frustrating limitations. One major issue is that users often cannot choose the exact song they want to play and are forced to use shuffle play. Another problem is that it's not possible to start a song from a specific part or timestamp, which makes it difficult to listen to favorite sections of a track. While I understand that premium features help support the platform, these restrictions can make the free experience less enjoyable.

The free version is terrible and I won't recommend anyone to use the free version. The company is really greedy and puts an ad after every 2 to 3 songs. after a certain number you can't even select a song of your preference. the playlist you created can't even run in order, there is a shuffle system which won't turn off until you buy the premium, therefore you have to manually select the songs. Worst music app.

Spotify has been one of the best parts of my music journey. From discovering new songs to finding the perfect playlist for every mood, it always feels like there's something special waiting to be played. The recommendations are surprisingly accurate, and sometimes it feels like Spotify understands my taste better than I do. Whether I'm studying, relaxing, daydreaming, or just vibing with my favorite artists, the experience is smooth and enjoyable.

I have been using Spotify for almost five years and have remained loyal to the platform. While ads in the free version were understandable, the recent restrictions on basic features like changing songs have been very disappointing. It feels as though user experience is being sacrificed for profit. As a long-time user, I expected better. These changes have made the platform far less enjoyable, and I am now considering switching to another music service.

I've enjoyed using Spotify for years, but lately it's been disappointing. The free version is packed with ads and so many limitations that listening to music just isn't fun anymore. And when I finally considered upgrading, I found out the Duo plan was gone. It was the perfect option for couples like us who wanted separate accounts without paying for a Family plan. Feels like Spotify is making things worse instead of better for its users. Bring back the Duo plan and make the free version better.

The experience of premium ads while playing the songs is so terrible. It spoils the mood for listening and enjoying the songs. The experience is so damn terrible and frustrating. And also there's no skip option in ads which makes me wait till the end of the ad to get over. Every time when I want to listen to any song, I've to go through the minutes of long ads before enjoying the music. It's exhausting. Please don't be greedy for money profit and decrease the number of ads for free users.

Spotify is an amazing music app with a huge collection of songs, podcasts, and playlists. The interface is easy to use, and the personalized recommendations help me discover new music every day. I especially love the curated playlists and the ability to listen across different devices. Overall, Spotify provides a great listening experience and is one of the best music streaming platforms available. Highly recommended!
